description: Official aiMl lane plugin manifest (vendor-neutral, provider-instance-backed): a PRE-MERGE analysis lane whose joined input is the sibling lane outputs (technical/pattern/sentiment/news namespaces); the node reads its explicit providerInstanceRef, and the runtime provider layer resolves the instance and invokes the trusted registered aiMl adapter (first-party self-hosted service). Emits exactly one governed aiMl result; never read by the scorer. External service call — NOT deterministic.
